family_summary: This overwrite breaks the old weak whole-city scaffold into cleaner Seoul-specific subepisodes: the Hangang Bridge demolition during the June fall, the Seoul National University Hospital massacre, and the September recapture campaign. The June fall is therefore represented through bounded subepisodes rather than a single citywide row.
notes: The bundle keeps the June collapse, massacre-type subepisodes, and September recapture analytically separate. No Korean War peninsula-wide denominator is imported.
